code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut sign = 1
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    let b = match bopt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if has_digit
        result = list.push(result, current * sign)
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
        sign = 1
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()

let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
let nums2 = parse_line(line2)

mut dedup = []
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(nums1)
  let v = match list.get(nums1, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if not list.contains(dedup, v)
    dedup = list.push(dedup, v)
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut j = 0
while j < list.len(nums2)
  let v = match list.get(nums2, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if not list.contains(dedup, v)
    dedup = list.push(dedup, v)
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut sorted = []
mut remaining = dedup
while list.len(remaining) > 0
  let first = match list.get(remaining, 0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  mut min_val = first
  mut k = 1
  while k < list.len(remaining)
    let v = match list.get(remaining, k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v < min_val
      min_val = v
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
  mut new_remaining = []
  mut m = 0
  while m < list.len(remaining)
    let v = match list.get(remaining, m)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v != min_val
      new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  remaining = new_remaining
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
while p < list.len(sorted)
  let v = match list.get(sorted, p)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if p == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
